title: Vežba 45

questions.text:
Ovo je e-mail od Jamesa za njegov tim.

To: Team

Subject: Bug fixed. Database credentials updated

Hey team,

I found the bug from yesterday. First, I checked the recent code changes but didn't see anything. Then, I looked at the error logs and realized the system wasn't connecting to the database properly. We hadn't updated the credentials after the last security patch. I fixed the credentials, and the app is now running smoothly!

Best regards, James

Šta je bio glavni uzrok greške koju je Džejms otkrio?

answers.feedback: Problem nije bio povezan sa tim časopisima.

answers.answer: Sistem nije pravilno povezan sa bazom podataka.

instructions: Pročitajte sledeći tekst, a zatim odgovorite na pitanje ispod.
explanation: Da biste saznali glavni uzrok greške, pogledajte deo teksta koji govori o sistemskoj vezi. Obratite pažnju na rečenicu koja prethodi sa Then, I....
